title: Boiled Tunisian Lettuce Salad
description: A savory, light meal-prep dish featuring boiled baby lettuce leaves with a touch of lemon and olive oil for a paleo-friendly option.
instructions: Wash and dry the baby lettuce leaves.
Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add salt and then the baby lettuce leaves, cooking for about 2-3 minutes or until tender but still crisp.
Drain the cooked lettuce leaves in a colander and let them cool slightly.
In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil and lemon juice.
Gently toss the cooled lettuce leaves with the olive oil and lemon mixture to combine.
